title: Triage dependency CVEs by reachability and fix path
description: When a vulnerability advisory hits a dependency, assess exploitability in this codebase and choose patch, pin, or mitigate rather than reflexively bumping or ignoring.
body: Use when an audit, advisory, or scanner flags a CVE in a direct or transitive dependency. Do not blindly upgrade across major versions without testing, and avoid silently muting an advisory you have not assessed. Actions: identify the affected version range, whether the vulnerable code path is reachable from this app, the available fixed version, and the breaking-change risk; record severity, reachability, and the chosen action. Validation signals include the scanner reporting the advisory resolved and the regression test suite passing post-bump. Risk boundary: for a reachable critical/high CVE with no fix, escalate to a human and apply a compensating control rather than shipping unpatched.
